segments.text: I pull the curtain and lay in bed
I got fifteen movies of you playin' in my head
Chasin' the moonlight, watchin' the ocean turn blue
Forty roses couldn't cover my grave
No cross or rosary for my soul to save
That don't even have to be true
There's a crossroads I've been standin' on
It was just a back road to Babylon
And she's gone, and she's gone
Don't treat me like a stranger, the other side of love
Across seven oceans, I've painted your highway blue
There's a high road I've been standin' on
It was just a back road to Babylon
And she's gone, and she's gone

transcription.text:
I pull the curtain and lay in bed
 I got fifteen movies of you playin' in my head
 Chasin' the moonlight, watchin' the ocean turn blue
 Just thinkin' about you
 Thinkin' about you

 Forty roses couldn't cover my grave
 No cross or rosary for my soul to save
 Wanna believe in something
 That don't even have to be true
 I'm just thinkin' about you
 Thinkin' about you

 There's a crossroads I've been standin' on
 It was just a back road to Babylon
 And she's gone, and she's gone

 Wayward angel, morning dove
 Don't treat me like a stranger, the other side of love
 Across seven oceans, I've painted your highway blue
 Just thinkin' about you
 Thinkin' about you

 There's a high road I've been standin' on
 It was just a back road to Babylon
 And she's gone, and she's gone
